title: ServerInfo fields are entirely undocumented
description: client.rs: ServerInfo has 14 public fields (version, build, comm_data_len, nvm_object_count, keycache_count, keycache_bufsize, keycache_bigcount, keycache_bigbufsize, customcb_count, dmaaddr_count, debug_state, boot_state, lifecycle_state, nvm_state) and none of them has a doc comment. A caller of info() gets this struct back and cannot interpret any field without reading wolfHSM C headers. At minimum the struct-level doc should note which wolfHSM C function populates it (wh_Client_CommInfo) and what the state fields encode (debug_state, boot_state, lifecycle_state, nvm_state are opaque integer enums). Field-level comments or a reference to wh_comm.h would make this struct self-explanatory.
